title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
